falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes below 4000 (key support level) on 3 separate trading days within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a breakdown in the pattern, contradicting the bottom_2024_aug formation and invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 50+ (threshold for extreme market pressure) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would suggest a blowoff top scenario rather than a bottom pattern, directly contradicting the current pattern match analysis

falsification_conditions.condition: U.S. unemployment rate drops below 4.0% in the next 14 days (as reported by BLS)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong labor market conditions contradicting the expected recessionary bottom pattern, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
